response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with ~19 years of broad experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, plus open-source leadership and community teaching. However, this is a director-level principal role centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows no track record of organization-level technical leadership, strategic advisory work, or recognized AI expertise. AI exposure is recent and tooling-focused (MCP generators, agent infrastructure) rather than demonstrated AI products or platforms, and there is no advanced AI-related degree.
strengths: 19+ years of engineering experience across diverse stacks and domains, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Public speaking, workshops, and open-source contributions show ability to share insights and mentor
concerns: No director-level or strategic leadership experience; career has stayed at senior/staff IC delivery level
AI experience is recent and shallow relative to the role's requirement for recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of cloud platform strategy work at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial projects
